International cooperation in actionRoundtable discussion with the Embassy of Egypt in Uzbekistan.
Gallery Blog

Ambassador of Egypt to Uzbekistan visits TSMU Chirchik Branch.

The Egyptian Embassy visit was an important moment for the university’s international relations agenda. The meeting created an opportunity to discuss academic cooperation, medical education, student support, cultural exchange and future collaboration between Uzbekistan and Egypt.

University representatives, invited guests, faculty members and students participated in a roundtable discussion highlighting the importance of global cooperation in training future healthcare professionals.
